description: 检测简体中文消息。Chinese Simplified is handled by the CJK tokenizer path. Expected accuracy: excellent — Chinese characters (hanzi) are fully distinct from all other languages in this pack. Chinese Traditional shares characters with Simplified but uses different forms for some common characters — this pack targets Simplified (Mainland China, Singapore). Common particles and endings (的、了、吗、呢、吧、啊) are strong signals. No overlap possible with Latin-script intents.

zh: 请问如何开始使用这个产品
能解释一下这是如何工作的吗
我想取消我的订阅
请问客服的工作时间是什么
付款意外失败了

这个功能无法正常工作
